title: Acetosella zuccarinii
taxonomy: Acetosella zuccarinii belongs to the family Oxalidaceae and is a type of flowering plant. It is a species of wood sorrel and is native to South Africa. The classification of Acetosella zuccarinii is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Oxalidales, Family: Oxalidaceae, Genus: Acetosella, Species: A. zuccarinii. This plant is a succulent and grows in areas with high temperatures and low rainfall. Acetosella zuccarinii is often used as a decorative plant in gardens due to its attractive foliage.
